query:
-- Check BI00018 parsed fields
SELECT externalId, description, parsedSpeedTier, parsedContractMonths, parsedHardwareStatus, parsedHas4gBackup, parsedDataAllowance, retailBundleComponent
FROM billing_items WHERE externalId = 'BI00018';

-- Check S0412 ABB service for speed info
SELECT externalId, planName, serviceType, provider, monthlyCost, 
  parsedSpeedTier, parsedAvcId
FROM services WHERE externalId = 'S0412';

-- Check how many bundle items have empty parsedSpeedTier
SELECT COUNT(*) as emptySpeed, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN parsedSpeedTier != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasSpeed
FROM billing_items WHERE description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied%';
